text:
Under the Faraway Sky Tōi Sora no Shita de (遠い空の下で) is the fourth light novel in the Fullmetal Alchemist series.

Chapters

Under the Faraway Sky
Roy's Holiday

Synopsis

A year after they started on their quest for their bodies, Edward and Alphonse Elric are waylaid in a small town and are staying in a house while Ed recovers from a fever. Pitt comes along as an assistant to a doctor for a check-up. Ed and Pitt reminisce about times past, including comparing their heights. Pitt instructs Ed to come to the clinic tomorrow afternoon. During the check-up, Al plays with some kids and the doctor advises Ed to slow down a bit and relax.
